title: cola ricinifolia
intro: Cola ricinifolia, also known as the bitter cola plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sterculiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Cola ricinifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can also be used in the form of dried roots, bark, and leaves for medicinal purposes.
